context: Evaluates the agent's ability to split oversized phases and annotate parallel waves.

checklist.name: Identify oversized
checklist.description: Agent recognises when a phase has too many tasks

checklist.name: Propose split
checklist.description: Agent proposes splitting into 2+ phases with 3-5 tasks each

checklist.name: Wave annotation
checklist.description: Agent annotates which tasks can run in parallel as waves

checklist.name: Exit criteria
checklist.description: Each proposed phase has a concrete exit criterion

checklist.name: Ask before splitting
checklist.description: Agent asks the user before splitting rather than doing it unilaterally
